scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix client run start:lan"
scripts.dev:web-android:full: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix client run start:lan"
scripts.dev:web:full: concurrently -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix client run web"
scripts.dev:android:full: concurrently -n backend,android -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix client run android"
scripts.dev:ios:full: concurrently -n backend,ios -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix client run ios"
scripts.dev:remote-api: concurrently -n backend,ngrok -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "ngrok http 4000 --log=stdout"
scripts.dev:remote-stack: concurrently -n backend,ngrok -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "ngrok http 4000 --log=stdout"
scripts.dev:remote-stack:web: concurrently -n backend,ngrok,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "ngrok http 4000 --log=stdout" "npm --prefix client run web"
scripts.vercel-build: npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm --prefix client run build:web
